evals.prompt_with_skill: /design Design the CLI interface for a file sync tool that watches local directories and syncs changes to S3. Supports multiple profiles, ignore patterns, and dry-run mode.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Design the CLI interface for a file sync tool that watches local directories and syncs changes to S3. Supports multiple profiles, ignore patterns, and dry-run mode. Generate at least 3 radically different designs, each with a different design constraint. Show interface signatures, usage examples, and tradeoffs for each. Then compare them and recommend which to use.

structural.check: Has at least 3 design sections
Each design has a distinct constraint or approach label
Each design shows interface signature or schema
Each design includes a usage example
Each design names its tradeoffs
Has a comparison section
Has a synthesis or recommendation section
Word count between 800 and 4000

evals.prompt_with_skill: /design Design the data model for a multi-tenant task management system. Tenants have workspaces, workspaces have projects, projects have tasks. Tasks support assignments, labels, due dates, and custom fields.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Design the data model for a multi-tenant task management system. Tenants have workspaces, workspaces have projects, projects have tasks. Tasks support assignments, labels, due dates, and custom fields. Generate at least 3 radically different designs (e.g., relational, document-oriented, event-sourced). Show schema, usage examples, and tradeoffs for each. Then compare them and recommend which to use.

structural.check: Has at least 3 design sections
Each design has a distinct constraint or approach label
Each design shows interface signature or schema
Each design includes a usage example
Each design names its tradeoffs
Has a comparison section
Has a synthesis or recommendation section
Word count between 800 and 4000

evals.prompt_with_skill: /design Design the configuration format for an autonomous pipeline runner. Pipelines have steps with prompts, acceptance criteria, model selection, retry policies, and skill dependencies. Steps can depend on other steps.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Design the configuration format for an autonomous pipeline runner. Pipelines have steps with prompts, acceptance criteria, model selection, retry policies, and skill dependencies. Steps can depend on other steps. Generate at least 3 radically different configuration designs. Show schema, usage examples, and tradeoffs for each. Then compare them and recommend which to use.
